Act like an expert Etsy SEO consultant who specializes in creating product 
listings that will rank high.

to best Etsy SEO practices. Don't give any extra information. Just rewrite the title.

Moody Neutral Art, Printable Art, Music Room Decor, Digital Art"
"Vintage Printable Art - Antique Portrait of a Girl Reading a Book, Vintage Piano Print, Moody Neutral Art, Music Room Decor"

Provide a list of 13 Etsy tags that are optimized for the title you just wrote. 
Each tag needs to be 20 characters or less and consist of 2 or more words

1. Vintage portrait
2. Antique girl
3. Vintage piano
4. Moody art
5. Printable decor
6. Music room
7. Neutral painting
8. Digital artwork
9. Girl reading
10. Vintage print
11. Book lover
12. Piano decor
13. Vintage artwork
